bird.name: Legge's hawk-eagle
bird.summary: Legge's hawk-eagle (Nisaetus kelaarti) is a bird of prey. Like all eagles, it is in the family Accipitridae.

locations.name: 印度

locations.name: 斯里蘭卡
locations.summary: 斯里兰卡民主社会主义共和国（僧伽羅語：ශ්‍රී ලංකා ප්‍රජාතාන්ත්‍රික සමාජවාදී ජනරජය；坦米爾語：இலங்கை சனநாயக சோஷலிசக் குடியரசு；英語：Democratic Social…

relations.subject: Legge's hawk-eagle
relations.evidence: It breeds in the Indian subcontinent, from southern India to Sri Lanka.Grimmett, Richard; Inskipp, Carol, Inskipp, Tim & Byers, Clive (1999): Birds of India, Pakistan, Nepal, Bangladesh, Bhutan, Sri Lanka, and the Maldives
